learning_items.observation: Implementation and read-only review should remain separate evidence roles for this software-code profile.
learning_items.next_effect: Use this as a prior for similar tasks only after fresh runtime, tool, context, and permission scans.

learning_items.observation: A compact context pack can give workers task scope, verification expectations, and permission boundaries without copying a full transcript.
learning_items.next_effect: Include context-pack refs in future dispatches for non-trivial routed tasks.

proposed_updates.proposal: No protocol, schema, local overlay, skill, runtime adapter, or memory update is required by this example beyond the recorded fixtures.

privacy_notes: Learning feedback stores evidence refs and short summaries only; no secrets or hidden conversations are copied.
